rm_publisher.name: rm_publisher
rm_publisher.documentation: Publisher of model expressed in the schema. Persisted attribute.

rm_release.name: rm_release
rm_release.documentation: Release of model expressed in the schema as a 3-part numeric, e.g. "3.1.0". Persisted attribute.

schema_name.name: schema_name
schema_name.documentation: Name of model expressed in schema; a 'schema' usually contains all of the packages of one 'model' of a publisher. A publisher with more than one model can have multiple schemas. Persisted attribute.

schema_author.name: schema_author
schema_author.documentation: Primary author of schema. Persisted attribute.

schema_contributors.name: schema_contributors
schema_contributors.documentation: Contributing authors of schema. Persisted attribute.

archetype_parent_class.name: archetype_parent_class
archetype_parent_class.documentation: Name of a parent class used within the schema to provide archetype capability, enabling filtering of classes in RM visualisation. If empty, 'Any' is assumed. Persisted attribute.

archetype_data_value_parent_class.name: archetype_data_value_parent_class
archetype_data_value_parent_class.documentation: Name of a parent class of logical 'data types' used within the schema to provide archetype capability, enabling filtering of classes in RM visualisation. If empty, 'Any' is assumed. Persisted attribute.

archetype_rm_closure_packages.name: archetype_rm_closure_packages
archetype_rm_closure_packages.documentation: List of top-level package paths that provide the RM 'model' part in archetype identifiers, e.g. the path "org.openehr.ehr" gives "EHR" in "openEHR-EHR". Within this namespace, archetypes can be based on any class reachable from classes defined directly in these packages. Persisted attribute.

archetype_visualise_descendants_of.name: archetype_visualise_descendants_of
archetype_visualise_descendants_of.documentation: If archetype_parent_class is not set, designate a class whose descendants should be made visible in tree and grid renderings of the archetype definition. Persisted attribute.

schema_id.name: schema_id
schema_id.documentation: Derived name of schema, based on model publisher, model name, model release.
